title: senegalia ferruginea
intro: Senegalia ferruginea, also known as the Iron Tree or Marula Bush, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Senegalia ferruginea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
